extract: If you were looking for the EX Dragon theme deck, see FireFang (TCG). Fire Fang (Japanese: ほのおのキバ Flame Fang) is a damage-dealing Fire-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TM68 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM008 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM014 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A. It can be thought of as a counterpart to Ice Fang and Thunder Fang, having similar names and effects.
